name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : state[i] = "idle"

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]

        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "trying"
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision

Init == /\ participants = 1..N
       /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "unknown"]
       /\ decision = "none"

Prepare == /\ decision = "none"
          /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "unknown"
          /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "unknown"

VoteYes(p) == /\ decision = "none"
             /\ votes[p] = "unknown"
             /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "yes"]

VoteNo(p) == /\ decision = "none"
            /\ votes[p] = "unknown"
            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "no"]

Commit == /\ decision = "none"
          /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "yes"
          /\ decision' = "commit"

Abort == /\ decision = "none"
          /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "no"
          /\ decision' = "abort"

Next == \/ /\ decision = "none" /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "unknown" /\ \E p \in participants: VoteYes(p)
       \/ /\ decision = "none" /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "unknown" /\ \E p \in participants: VoteNo(p)
       \/ /\ decision = "none" /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "yes" /\ Commit
       \/ /\ decision = "none" /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "no" /\ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; 0 means free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = 0
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks *)
          /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![%(i, N) + 1] = 0]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES num, flag

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Next == 
    \/ /\ count < K
        /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = (tail % K) + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, head)
    \/ /\ count > 0
        /\ head' = (head % K) + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS ServerSet

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
        /\ votedFor \in {None} \/ [x \in ServerSet |-> x]
        /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
       /\ votedFor = None
       /\ state = Follower

Next == \/ /\ state = Follower
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = Candidate
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
       \/ /\ state = Candidate
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = Leader
       \/ /\ state = Leader
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = Leader

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
